title: Jönköping Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Jönköping with a Z-Score of -3.77. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current temperature in Jönköping is significantly lower than average, with a Z-Score of -3.77 indicating a rare and extreme event. 
 The city is experiencing a critical cold snap, with a score of 10.0/10 and a HDD of 14.2 GG, resulting in increased energy demand. 
 The low humidity of 42% and gentle wind of 5.0 km/h are exacerbating the cold conditions, with no CDD recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to ensure public safety and energy supply.
